# Florida Claim Solutions

> Florida Claim Solutions is a surplus funds recovery company serving all 67 Florida counties. The company helps former property owners and legal heirs recover unclaimed funds that result when a property sells at a foreclosure or tax deed auction for more than the amount owed on outstanding liens and mortgages.

## About

Florida Claim Solutions is operated by Sergi Puzankov under Marco Concept LLC, headquartered at 12632 East Tamiami Trail #1005, Naples, FL 34113. The company works on a contingency basis: clients pay no upfront costs and a fee of 20–25% only upon successful recovery. Florida Claim Solutions is not a law firm; it is a claims processing service that partners with licensed legal professionals to file claims on behalf of clients.

## Services

- Surplus funds recovery from foreclosure auction sales
- Surplus funds recovery from tax deed sales
- Free eligibility verification and fund search
- Legal document preparation and county court claim filing
- Heir eligibility verification

## Service Area

All 67 Florida counties including Miami-Dade, Broward, Palm Beach, Hillsborough, Orange, Pinellas, Lee, Collier, Duval, Sarasota, Polk, Manatee, Seminole, Volusia, and Leon counties.

## Process

1. Free search to identify available surplus funds using county records
2. Eligibility verification using public and property records
3. Free consultation and contingency agreement — no upfront cost
4. Filing claim with the relevant Florida county clerk of courts
5. Disbursement to client via direct deposit or check (typically 60–120 days)

## Key Facts

- No upfront costs; contingency fee of 20–25% of recovered funds only
- Typical recovery timeline: 60–120 days
- Statewide Florida coverage across all 67 counties
- Governed by Florida Statute §45.032 (foreclosure surplus) and Florida Statute §197 (tax deed surplus)
- Founded by Sergi Puzankov
